Committed. All work is complete and verified. ``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary **Implemented** (all plan phases): - **`index.html`** — HTML5 page with `lang="en"`, viewport meta, `Hula — Coming Soon`, semantic `
` > `

Welcome to Hula

`, and an `under-construction` `
` with the 🚧 icon (`aria-hidden`), "Under Construction" heading, and message. Includes the intent HTML comment. - **`styles.css`** — CSS reset, centered flex layout, amber under-construction banner, relative font units for responsiveness. - **`.github/workflows/pages.yml`** — GitHub Pages deploy workflow (`actions/deploy-pages`) on push to `main`. **Verification** (no build/lint tooling exists — greenfield static site, so I validated directly): - ✓ HTML tag nesting well-formed (Python `HTMLParser`, zero errors) - ✓ Linked `styles.css` resolves; CSS braces balanced - ✓ AC2 `

` "Welcome to Hula", AC3 🚧 + "Under Construction" + message, AC4 title, AC6 no `
